<!-- Thanks for contributing to ContextKit! Please fill out the sections below. -->

## Summary

<!-- A short description of the change and the motivation behind it. -->

## Type

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Chore / refactor / infra

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this change? Commands run, scenarios covered, screenshots for UI. -->

```
# e.g. pnpm -r test
```

## Checklist

- [ ] Linked issue (e.g. `Closes #123`)
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Docs updated (`docs/`, `README`, package READMEs)
- [ ] Changeset added (`pnpm changeset`) — required for any change shipping in `contextkit`
